title: Add SCHC fragmentation vectors
description: Add independently derived shared fragmentation vectors and schema coverage for regular, All-0, All-1, RCS, ACK C=0/C=1, bitmap compression/order, missing tiles, retransmission, malformed messages, capacity, and aborts. Never generate expected bytes with code under test.
acceptance_criteria: Python, Rust, and C consume identical committed literal vectors with independent provenance documented.
close_reason: Completed in d2ce3ff90: independent RFC 8724 fragmentation vectors cover regular/All-0/All-1, RCS, ACK bitmaps and recovery, retransmission, retry exhaustion and aborts, capacity boundaries, controls, and malformed inputs. Shared Draft-07 schema and typed Python/Rust/C mechanical consumers added. Validation: Python/Ruff 151 passed, Rust fixture test and Rust 2021 formatting passed, generated header passed strict host C11 compilation, git diff --check passed, and three final independent reviews found no blocking defects. Zephyr execution remains unavailable without a west workspace/AWS authentication.
